---
title: "Questionnaires"
author: "Matteo Roberto Teagno"
format: pdf
editor: visual
---

### Setup

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(car)
library(emmeans)
library(ggplot2)

# IDs to exclude across all analyses (n = 6)
excluded_ids <- c("ID28", "ID48", "ID43", "ID10", "ID11", "ID31")
```

# Affect Grid

## Arousal

```{r}
ArousalData <- read_excel("ArousalData.xlsx")
# view(ArousalData)

## Prepare dataset

# Rename variables
ArousalData <- ArousalData %>%
  rename(
    Participant_ID = ID,
    Group          = condition,
    Timepoint      = measure
  )

# Recode "control" -> "Control"
ArousalData <- ArousalData %>%
  mutate(Group = dplyr::recode(Group, "control" = "Control"))

# Normalize Participant_ID to match excluded_ids format (e.g., "ID10")
# Handles both numeric (10) and string ("10" or "ID10") formats
ArousalData <- ArousalData %>%
  mutate(
    Participant_ID = as.character(Participant_ID),
    Participant_ID = ifelse(grepl("^ID", Participant_ID),
                            Participant_ID,
                            paste0("ID", Participant_ID))
  )

# Apply the 6-participant exclusion
ArousalData <- ArousalData %>%
  filter(!Participant_ID %in% excluded_ids)

# Set factors
ArousalData$Participant_ID <- as.factor(ArousalData$Participant_ID)
ArousalData$Group          <- as.factor(ArousalData$Group)

# Timepoint: coerce numeric codes 1-4 to T1-T4
ArousalData$Timepoint <- factor(ArousalData$Timepoint,
                                levels = c(1, 2, 3, 4),
                                labels = c("T1", "T2", "T3", "T4"))

# Relevel Group with Control as reference
ArousalData$Group <- relevel(ArousalData$Group, ref = "Control")

# Sanity check
cat("Group Ns after exclusion:\n")
print(ArousalData %>%
        distinct(Participant_ID, Group) %>%
        count(Group))

cat("\nLevels:\n")
print(levels(ArousalData$Group))
print(levels(ArousalData$Timepoint))
str(ArousalData)
```

### Linear Mixed Model (Group × Timepoint)



```{r}
print("--- MODEL: Arousal (Group x Timepoint) ---")

m_Arousal <- lmer(Arousal ~ Group * Timepoint + (1 | Participant_ID),
                  data = ArousalData, REML = FALSE)

print(Anova(m_Arousal, type = "II"))
```


```{r}
### Pairwise contrasts (unadjusted, exploratory)

print("--- PAIRWISE CONTRASTS (Group by Timepoint) ---")

emm_Arousal <- emmeans(m_Arousal, ~ Group | Timepoint)
print(pairs(emm_Arousal, adjust = "none"))
```
### Plot

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(scales)

# ============================================================================
# 1. PASTEL COLORS  (matching Stroop/SART)
# ============================================================================
group_colors <- c("Control"       = "#B8B8BE",
                  "2D Meditation" = "#F4A4A4",
                  "VR Meditation" = "#A4C4F4")

# ============================================================================
# 2. THEME
# ============================================================================
thesis_theme <- theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    legend.position    = "top",
    legend.title       = element_blank(),
    legend.text        = element_text(size = 11),
    legend.key.size    = unit(0.55, "cm"),
    legend.spacing.x   = unit(0.3, "cm"),
    plot.title         = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14, hjust = 0,
                                      margin = margin(b = 4)),
    plot.subtitle      = element_text(size = 10.5, color = "gray35", hjust = 0,
                                      margin = margin(b = 12),
                                      lineheight = 1.15),
    axis.title.y       = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11.5,
                                      margin = margin(r = 10)),
    axis.text          = element_text(size = 10.5, color = "gray10"),
    axis.line          = element_line(linewidth = 0.5, color = "gray10"),
    axis.ticks         = element_line(linewidth = 0.5, color = "gray10"),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "gray92", linewidth = 0.3),
    plot.margin        = margin(15, 20, 15, 15)
  )

# ============================================================================
# 3. DATA PREP — rename groups so labels match other figures
# ============================================================================
ArousalData <- ArousalData %>%
  mutate(
    Group = case_when(
      as.character(Group) == "Control"       ~ "Control",
      as.character(Group) == "2D"            ~ "2D Meditation",
      as.character(Group) == "Meditation_2D" ~ "2D Meditation",
      as.character(Group) == "VR"            ~ "VR Meditation",
      as.character(Group) == "VR_Meditation" ~ "VR Meditation",
      TRUE                                    ~ as.character(Group)
    ),
    Group = factor(Group, levels = c("Control", "2D Meditation", "VR Meditation"))
  )

# ============================================================================
# 4. BRACKETS — T3 between-group contrasts
#    Control vs 2D (p = .016, *)  AND  Control vs VR (p = .012, *)
#    Stagger heights so they don't overlap
# ============================================================================
dodge_w  <- 0.8
g_offset <- c(-dodge_w/3, 0, dodge_w/3)   # Control, 2D, VR
n_tp     <- length(unique(ArousalData$Timepoint))
t3_x     <- which(sort(unique(as.character(ArousalData$Timepoint))) == "T3")  # numeric x-pos of T3

# Find the highest bar+SE at T3 across all groups
t3_top <- ArousalData %>%
  filter(Timepoint == "T3") %>%
  group_by(Group) %>%
  summarise(top = mean(Arousal, na.rm = TRUE) +
                   sd(Arousal,  na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
            .groups = "drop") %>%
  pull(top) %>% max()

# Inner bracket: Control vs 2D (shorter, lower)
# Outer bracket: Control vs VR (longer, higher)
y_inner <- t3_top + 0.35
y_outer <- t3_top + 0.95
tick_len <- 0.15

br_T3 <- data.frame(
  x_start = c(t3_x + g_offset[1], t3_x + g_offset[1]),   # both start at Control
  x_end   = c(t3_x + g_offset[2], t3_x + g_offset[3]),   # 2D, VR
  y_pos   = c(y_inner,            y_outer),
  y_tick  = c(y_inner - tick_len, y_outer - tick_len),
  label   = c("*",                "*")
)

y_top_arousal <- y_outer + 0.4

# ============================================================================
# 5. PLOT
# ============================================================================
p_Arousal <- ggplot(ArousalData,
                    aes(x = Timepoint, y = Arousal, fill = Group)) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "bar",
               position = position_dodge(dodge_w),
               width = 0.7, color = "black", linewidth = 0.4, alpha = 0.95) +
  geom_point(aes(color = Group),
             position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 0.18,
                                              dodge.width = dodge_w),
             size = 1.5, alpha = 0.6, show.legend = FALSE) +
  stat_summary(fun.data = mean_se, geom = "errorbar",
               width = 0.18, position = position_dodge(dodge_w),
               color = "black", linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_segment(data = br_T3, inherit.aes = FALSE,
               aes(x = x_start, xend = x_end, y = y_pos, yend = y_pos),
               linewidth = 0.45, color = "gray10") +
  geom_segment(data = br_T3, inherit.aes = FALSE,
               aes(x = x_start, xend = x_start, y = y_tick, yend = y_pos),
               linewidth = 0.45, color = "gray10") +
  geom_segment(data = br_T3, inherit.aes = FALSE,
               aes(x = x_end, xend = x_end, y = y_tick, yend = y_pos),
               linewidth = 0.45, color = "gray10") +
  geom_text(data = br_T3, inherit.aes = FALSE,
            aes(x = (x_start + x_end)/2, y = y_pos, label = label),
            size = 5, fontface = "bold", vjust = -0.35) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = group_colors) +
  scale_color_manual(values = group_colors) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, y_top_arousal)) +
  labs(title    = "Arousal across Timepoints",
       subtitle = "Arousal rose with cognitive load (T2, T4) and dropped after the intervention (T3);\n2D and VR Meditation groups showed lower arousal than Control at T3",
       y = "Arousal Score", x = NULL) +
  thesis_theme

print(p_Arousal)

# ============================================================================
# 6. SAVE
# ============================================================================
ggsave("Arousal_Timepoints.png", p_Arousal,
       width = 7, height = 5.5, dpi = 600, bg = "white")
```


```{r}
#Change score T3-T1
Arousal_wide <- ArousalData %>%
select(Participant_ID, Group, Timepoint, Arousal) %>%
pivot_wider(names_from = Timepoint, values_from = Arousal)
View(Arousal_wide)
Arousal_wide <- Arousal_wide %>%
mutate(change_T1_T3 = T3 - T1)
m_change <- lm(change_T1_T3 ~ Group, data = Arousal_wide)
anova(m_change)

emmeans(m_change, pairwise ~ Group)
```

## Pleasure 


```{r}
# Load data
PleasureData <- read_excel("pleasure.xlsx")

# Prepare dataset
PleasureData <- PleasureData %>%
  rename(
    Participant_ID = ID,
    Group = condition,
    Timepoint = measure
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Group = dplyr::recode(Group, "control" = "Control"),
    Participant_ID = as.character(Participant_ID),
    Participant_ID = ifelse(grepl("^ID", Participant_ID),
                            Participant_ID,
                            paste0("ID", Participant_ID))
  ) %>%
  filter(!Participant_ID %in% excluded_ids)

PleasureData$Participant_ID <- as.factor(PleasureData$Participant_ID)
PleasureData$Timepoint <- factor(PleasureData$Timepoint,
                                 levels = c(1, 2, 3, 4),
                                 labels = c("T1", "T2", "T3", "T4"))
PleasureData$Timepoint <- relevel(PleasureData$Timepoint, ref = "T1")        # ← ADD THIS
contrasts(PleasureData$Timepoint) <- contr.treatment(levels(PleasureData$Timepoint))  # ← ADD THIS
PleasureData$Group <- as.factor(PleasureData$Group)
PleasureData$Group <- relevel(PleasureData$Group, ref = "Control")

cat("Group Ns after exclusion:\n")
print(PleasureData %>% distinct(Participant_ID, Group) %>% count(Group))
str(PleasureData)
```


```{r}
# Linear Mixed Model (Group x Phase)
print("--- MODEL: Pleasure (Group x Phase) ---")
m_Pleasure <- lmer(Pleasure ~ Group * Timepoint + (1|Participant_ID),
data = PleasureData, REML = FALSE)
print(Anova(m_Pleasure, type="II"))

```

```{r}
#Exploratory pairwise contrasts
print("--- PAIRWISE CONTRASTS (Pleasure by Phase) ---")
emm_Pleasure <- emmeans(m_Pleasure, ~ Group | Timepoint)
print(pairs(emm_Pleasure, adjust="none"))
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(scales)

# ============================================================================
# 1. PASTEL COLORS  (matching all other thesis figures)
# ============================================================================
group_colors <- c("Control"       = "#B8B8BE",
                  "2D Meditation" = "#F4A4A4",
                  "VR Meditation" = "#A4C4F4")

# ============================================================================
# 2. THEME
# ============================================================================
thesis_theme <- theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    legend.position    = "top",
    legend.title       = element_blank(),
    legend.text        = element_text(size = 11),
    legend.key.size    = unit(0.55, "cm"),
    legend.spacing.x   = unit(0.3, "cm"),
    plot.title         = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14, hjust = 0,
                                      margin = margin(b = 4)),
    plot.subtitle      = element_text(size = 10.5, color = "gray35", hjust = 0,
                                      margin = margin(b = 12),
                                      lineheight = 1.15),
    axis.title.y       = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11.5,
                                      margin = margin(r = 10)),
    axis.text          = element_text(size = 10.5, color = "gray10"),
    axis.line          = element_line(linewidth = 0.5, color = "gray10"),
    axis.ticks         = element_line(linewidth = 0.5, color = "gray10"),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "gray92", linewidth = 0.3),
    plot.margin        = margin(15, 20, 15, 15)
  )

# ============================================================================
# 3. DATA PREP — rename groups for consistent labels
# ============================================================================
PleasureData <- PleasureData %>%
  mutate(
    Group = case_when(
      tolower(as.character(Group)) == "control" ~ "Control",
      as.character(Group) == "2D"               ~ "2D Meditation",
      as.character(Group) == "Meditation_2D"    ~ "2D Meditation",
      as.character(Group) == "VR"               ~ "VR Meditation",
      as.character(Group) == "VR_Meditation"    ~ "VR Meditation",
      TRUE                                       ~ as.character(Group)
    ),
    Group = factor(Group, levels = c("Control", "2D Meditation", "VR Meditation"))
  )

# ============================================================================
# 4. PLOT
# ============================================================================
dodge_w <- 0.8

p_Pleasure <- ggplot(PleasureData,
                     aes(x = Timepoint, y = Pleasure, fill = Group)) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "bar",
               position = position_dodge(dodge_w),
               width = 0.7, color = "black", linewidth = 0.4, alpha = 0.95) +
  geom_point(aes(color = Group),
             position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 0.18,
                                              dodge.width = dodge_w),
             size = 1.5, alpha = 0.6, show.legend = FALSE) +
  stat_summary(fun.data = mean_se, geom = "errorbar",
               width = 0.18, position = position_dodge(dodge_w),
               color = "black", linewidth = 0.5) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = group_colors) +
  scale_color_manual(values = group_colors) +
  labs(title    = "Pleasure across Timepoints",
       subtitle = "Pleasure dipped with cognitive load (T2, T4) and rose after the intervention (T3);\nno significant differences between groups at any timepoint",
       y = "Pleasure Score", x = NULL) +
  thesis_theme

print(p_Pleasure)

# ============================================================================
# 5. SAVE
# ============================================================================
ggsave("Pleasure_Timepoints.png", p_Pleasure,
       width = 7, height = 5.5, dpi = 600, bg = "white")
```



```{r}
#Change score T3-T1
Pleasure_wide <- PleasureData %>%
select(Participant_ID, Group, Timepoint, Pleasure) %>%
pivot_wider(names_from = Timepoint, values_from = Pleasure)
View(Pleasure_wide)
Pleasure_wide <- Pleasure_wide %>%
mutate(change_T1_T3 = T3 - T1)
m_change <- lm(change_T1_T3 ~ Group, data = Pleasure_wide)
anova(m_change)
emmeans(m_change, pairwise ~ Group)
```
By including T1 pleasure as a covariate, you statistically remove the baseline differences before testing for Group effects

```{r}
# Build a wide-format T1 column to use as covariate
T1_pleasure <- PleasureData %>%
  filter(Timepoint == "T1") %>%
  select(Participant_ID, Pleasure_T1 = Pleasure)

# Merge it back, then run model on T2-T4 only
PleasureData_adj <- PleasureData %>%
  left_join(T1_pleasure, by = "Participant_ID") %>%
  filter(Timepoint != "T1")

# Drop the unused T1 level so the model doesn't complain
PleasureData_adj$Timepoint <- droplevels(PleasureData_adj$Timepoint)
PleasureData_adj$Timepoint <- relevel(PleasureData_adj$Timepoint, ref = "T2")        # ← ADDED
contrasts(PleasureData_adj$Timepoint) <- contr.treatment(levels(PleasureData_adj$Timepoint))  # ← ADDED

# Baseline-adjusted model
m_Pleasure_adj <- lmer(Pleasure ~ Group * Timepoint + Pleasure_T1 + (1|Participant_ID),
                       data = PleasureData_adj, REML = FALSE)
print(Anova(m_Pleasure_adj, type = "II"))

# Pairwise contrasts at T3 (most theoretically meaningful timepoint)
emm_Pleasure_adj <- emmeans(m_Pleasure_adj, ~ Group | Timepoint)
print(pairs(emm_Pleasure_adj, adjust = "none"))
```

```{r}
library(patchwork)
library(cowplot)

# ============================================================================
# COMBINED FIGURE — Arousal (A) and Pleasure (B) stacked vertically
# Each panel in its own framed box, badges A/B in top-left
# ============================================================================

panel_border_theme <- theme(
  plot.background  = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
  legend.position  = "none",
  panel.grid.major.y = element_blank()
)

# Strip subtitles, keep plain panel titles, add border
p_Arousal_combined <- p_Arousal +
  labs(title = "Arousal", subtitle = NULL) +
  panel_border_theme

p_Pleasure_combined <- p_Pleasure +
  labs(title = "Pleasure", subtitle = NULL) +
  panel_border_theme

# Corner badge helper (same as RT and HR/RMSSD figures)
add_corner_badge <- function(plot, letter,
                             x = 0.015, y = 0.99,
                             box_w = 0.030, box_h = 0.075) {
  ggdraw(plot) +
    draw_grob(
      grid::rectGrob(
        x = x, y = y,
        width = box_w, height = box_h,
        just = c("left", "top"),
        gp = grid::gpar(fill = "white", col = "black", lwd = 0.8)
      )
    ) +
    draw_text(
      letter,
      x = x + box_w/2, y = y - box_h/2,
      hjust = 0.5, vjust = 0.5,
      size = 13, fontface = "bold"
    )
}

p_Arousal_badged  <- add_corner_badge(p_Arousal_combined,  "A")
p_Pleasure_badged <- add_corner_badge(p_Pleasure_combined, "B")

# Extract shared legend, larger size
legend_plot <- get_legend(
  p_Arousal + theme(legend.position = "top",
                    legend.title    = element_blank(),
                    legend.text     = element_text(size = 14),
                    legend.key.size = unit(0.9, "cm"))
)

# Stack panels vertically, legend on top
panels_col <- (p_Arousal_badged / p_Pleasure_badged)

combined_AP <- wrap_plots(
  legend_plot,
  panels_col,
  ncol = 1,
  heights = c(0.06, 1)
)

# Centered overall title
combined_AP <- combined_AP +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "Affect Grid Ratings across Timepoints",
    theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15,
                                            hjust = 0.5,
                                            margin = margin(b = 8)))
  )

print(combined_AP)

ggsave("Combined_ArousalPleasure.png", combined_AP,
       width = 9, height = 11, dpi = 600, bg = "white")
```

# SMS 

```{r}
# Load data
SMS <- read_excel("DataSMS_final.xlsx")

# Prepare dataset
SMS <- SMS %>%
  rename(
    Participant_ID = ID,
    Group = condition,
    Timepoint = measure
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Group = dplyr::recode(Group, "control" = "Control"),
    Participant_ID = as.character(Participant_ID),
    Participant_ID = ifelse(grepl("^ID", Participant_ID),
                            Participant_ID,
                            paste0("ID", Participant_ID))
  ) %>%
  filter(!Participant_ID %in% excluded_ids)

SMS$Participant_ID <- as.factor(SMS$Participant_ID)
SMS$Group <- factor(SMS$Group, levels = c("Control", "2D", "VR"))
SMS$Timepoint <- factor(SMS$Timepoint,
                        levels = c("T1", "T2", "T3", "T4"))
SMS$Timepoint <- relevel(SMS$Timepoint, ref = "T1")

cat("Group Ns after exclusion:\n")
print(SMS %>% distinct(Participant_ID, Group) %>% count(Group))
str(SMS)
```

```{r}
# Total SMS
print("--- MODEL: Total SMS (Group x Phase) ---")
m_total <- lmer(Total ~ Group * Timepoint + (1|Participant_ID),
                data = SMS, REML = FALSE)
print(Anova(m_total, type="II"))

# Mind
print("--- MODEL: Mind SMS (Group x Phase) ---")
m_mind <- lmer(Mind ~ Group * Timepoint + (1|Participant_ID),
               data = SMS, REML = FALSE)
print(Anova(m_mind, type="II"))

# Body
print("--- MODEL: Body SMS (Group x Phase) ---")
m_Body <- lmer(Body ~ Group * Timepoint + (1|Participant_ID),
               data = SMS, REML = FALSE)
print(Anova(m_Body, type="II"))

# Pairwise contrasts
print("--- PAIRWISE CONTRASTS (Total by Phase) ---")
emm_total <- emmeans(m_total, ~ Group | Timepoint)
print(pairs(emm_total, adjust="none"))

print("--- PAIRWISE CONTRASTS (Mind by Phase) ---")
emm_mind <- emmeans(m_mind, ~ Group | Timepoint)
print(pairs(emm_mind, adjust="none"))

print("--- PAIRWISE CONTRASTS (Body by Phase) ---")
emm_body <- emmeans(m_Body, ~ Group | Timepoint)
print(pairs(emm_body, adjust="none"))
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(scales)

# ============================================================================
# 1. PASTEL COLORS  (matching all other thesis figures)
# ============================================================================
group_colors <- c("Control"       = "#B8B8BE",
                  "2D Meditation" = "#F4A4A4",
                  "VR Meditation" = "#A4C4F4")

# ============================================================================
# 2. THEME
# ============================================================================
thesis_theme <- theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    legend.position    = "top",
    legend.title       = element_blank(),
    legend.text        = element_text(size = 11),
    legend.key.size    = unit(0.55, "cm"),
    legend.spacing.x   = unit(0.3, "cm"),
    plot.title         = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14, hjust = 0,
                                      margin = margin(b = 4)),
    plot.subtitle      = element_text(size = 10.5, color = "gray35", hjust = 0,
                                      margin = margin(b = 12),
                                      lineheight = 1.15),
    axis.title.y       = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11.5,
                                      margin = margin(r = 10)),
    axis.text          = element_text(size = 10.5, color = "gray10"),
    axis.line          = element_line(linewidth = 0.5, color = "gray10"),
    axis.ticks         = element_line(linewidth = 0.5, color = "gray10"),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    plot.margin        = margin(15, 20, 15, 15)
  )

# ============================================================================
# 3. DATA PREP — relabel groups to match other figures
# ============================================================================
SMS_plot <- SMS %>%
  mutate(
    Group = case_when(
      as.character(Group) == "Control" ~ "Control",
      as.character(Group) == "2D"      ~ "2D Meditation",
      as.character(Group) == "VR"      ~ "VR Meditation"
    ),
    Group = factor(Group, levels = c("Control", "2D Meditation", "VR Meditation"))
  )

# ============================================================================
# 4. BRACKET HELPER — Control vs VR at T3
# ============================================================================
dodge_w  <- 0.8
g_offset <- c(-dodge_w/3, 0, dodge_w/3)   # Control, 2D, VR

make_sms_bracket <- function(df, value_col, t3_label = "T3",
                             padding = 4, tick_len = 1.8, sig = "**") {
  t3_x <- which(levels(df$Timepoint) == t3_label)

  t3_top <- df %>%
    filter(Timepoint == t3_label) %>%
    group_by(Group) %>%
    summarise(top = mean(.data[[value_col]], na.rm = TRUE) +
                    sd(.data[[value_col]],  na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
              .groups = "drop") %>%
    pull(top) %>% max()

  data.frame(
    x_start = t3_x + g_offset[1],   # Control
    x_end   = t3_x + g_offset[3],   # VR
    y_pos   = t3_top + padding,
    y_tick  = t3_top + padding - tick_len,
    label   = sig
  )
}

add_brackets <- function(p, br) {
  p +
    geom_segment(data = br, inherit.aes = FALSE,
                 aes(x = x_start, xend = x_end, y = y_pos, yend = y_pos),
                 linewidth = 0.45, color = "gray10") +
    geom_segment(data = br, inherit.aes = FALSE,
                 aes(x = x_start, xend = x_start, y = y_tick, yend = y_pos),
                 linewidth = 0.45, color = "gray10") +
    geom_segment(data = br, inherit.aes = FALSE,
                 aes(x = x_end, xend = x_end, y = y_tick, yend = y_pos),
                 linewidth = 0.45, color = "gray10") +
    geom_text(data = br, inherit.aes = FALSE,
              aes(x = (x_start + x_end)/2, y = y_pos, label = label),
              size = 5, fontface = "bold", vjust = -0.35)
}

# ============================================================================
# 5. PLOT BUILDER (so we don't repeat 3 times)
# ============================================================================
build_sms_plot <- function(df, value_col, plot_title, plot_subtitle,
                            br_padding, br_tick, sig_label) {
  br <- make_sms_bracket(df, value_col,
                         padding = br_padding, tick_len = br_tick,
                         sig = sig_label)
  y_top <- br$y_pos + br_padding * 1.3
  data_max <- max(df[[value_col]], na.rm = TRUE)
  y_top <- max(y_top, data_max + br_padding * 0.5)

  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = Timepoint, y = .data[[value_col]], fill = Group)) +
    stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "bar",
                 position = position_dodge(dodge_w),
                 width = 0.7, color = "black", linewidth = 0.4, alpha = 0.95) +
    geom_point(aes(color = Group),
               position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 0.18,
                                                dodge.width = dodge_w),
               size = 1.5, alpha = 0.6, show.legend = FALSE) +
    stat_summary(fun.data = mean_se, geom = "errorbar",
                 width = 0.18, position = position_dodge(dodge_w),
                 color = "black", linewidth = 0.5) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = group_colors) +
    scale_color_manual(values = group_colors) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, y_top)) +
    labs(title    = plot_title,
         subtitle = plot_subtitle,
         y = "Score", x = NULL) +
    thesis_theme

  add_brackets(p, br)
}

# ============================================================================
# 6. THREE PLOTS
# ============================================================================
p_total <- build_sms_plot(
  df            = SMS_plot,
  value_col     = "Total",
  plot_title    = "State Mindfulness TOTAL Scores across Timepoints",
  plot_subtitle = "VR Meditation showed higher Total SMS than Control at T3 (p = .005);\nno significant group differences at other timepoints",
  br_padding    = 5,
  br_tick       = 2,
  sig_label     = "**"
)

p_mind <- build_sms_plot(
  df            = SMS_plot,
  value_col     = "Mind",
  plot_title    = "SMS — Mind Subscale across Timepoints",
  plot_subtitle = "VR Meditation showed higher Mind scores than Control at T3 (p = .013);\nparallel pattern to the Total SMS findings",
  br_padding    = 4,
  br_tick       = 1.5,
  sig_label     = "*"
)

p_body <- build_sms_plot(
  df            = SMS_plot,
  value_col     = "Body",
  plot_title    = " SMS - Body Subscale across Timepoints",
  plot_subtitle = "VR Meditation showed higher Body scores than Control at T3 (p = .008);\nparallel pattern to the Total SMS findings",
  br_padding    = 2,
  br_tick       = 0.8,
  sig_label     = "**"
)

print(p_total)
print(p_mind)
print(p_body)

# ============================================================================
# 7. SAVE
# ============================================================================
ggsave("SMS_Total.png", p_total, width = 7, height = 5.5, dpi = 600, bg = "white")
ggsave("SMS_Mind.png",  p_mind,  width = 7, height = 5.5, dpi = 600, bg = "white")
ggsave("SMS_Body.png",  p_body,  width = 7, height = 5.5, dpi = 600, bg = "white")

```

```{r}
library(patchwork)
library(cowplot)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

# ============================================================================
# COMBINED SMS FIGURE
# Panel A: Total SMS across T1-T4 (full timeline, top, full width)
# Panel B: Mind at T3 only (bottom left)
# Panel C: Body at T3 only (bottom right)
# ============================================================================

group_colors <- c("Control"       = "#B8B8BE",
                  "2D Meditation" = "#F4A4A4",
                  "VR Meditation" = "#A4C4F4")

# Shared panel theme (border + no legend per panel + clean axes)
sms_panel_theme <- theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title         = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13, hjust = 0.5,
                                      margin = margin(b = 8)),
    axis.title.y       = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11.5,
                                      margin = margin(r = 10)),
    axis.text          = element_text(size = 10.5, color = "gray10"),
    axis.line          = element_line(linewidth = 0.5, color = "gray10"),
    axis.ticks         = element_line(linewidth = 0.5, color = "gray10"),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    plot.margin        = margin(15, 20, 15, 15),
    legend.position    = "none",
    plot.background    = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "black", linewidth = 0.5)
  )

# ============================================================================
# DATA PREP — relabel groups, prepare T3-only subsets
# ============================================================================
SMS_plot <- SMS %>%
  mutate(
    Group = case_when(
      as.character(Group) == "Control" ~ "Control",
      as.character(Group) == "2D"      ~ "2D Meditation",
      as.character(Group) == "VR"      ~ "VR Meditation"
    ),
    Group = factor(Group, levels = c("Control", "2D Meditation", "VR Meditation"))
  )

# ============================================================================
# BRACKET HELPERS
# ============================================================================
dodge_w  <- 0.8
g_offset <- c(-dodge_w/3, 0, dodge_w/3)

make_full_timeline_bracket <- function(df, value_col, t3_label = "T3",
                                       padding = 6, tick_len = 2.5, sig = "**") {
  t3_x <- which(levels(df$Timepoint) == t3_label)
  t3_top <- df %>%
    filter(Timepoint == t3_label) %>%
    group_by(Group) %>%
    summarise(top = mean(.data[[value_col]], na.rm = TRUE) +
                    sd(.data[[value_col]],  na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
              .groups = "drop") %>%
    pull(top) %>% max()
  data.frame(
    x_start = t3_x + g_offset[1],
    x_end   = t3_x + g_offset[3],
    y_pos   = t3_top + padding,
    y_tick  = t3_top + padding - tick_len,
    label   = sig
  )
}

make_t3_bracket <- function(df, padding, tick_len, sig) {
  panel_top <- df %>%
    group_by(Group) %>%
    summarise(top = mean(Score, na.rm = TRUE) +
                    sd(Score,  na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
              .groups = "drop") %>%
    pull(top) %>% max()
  data.frame(
    x_start = 1, x_end = 3,
    y_pos   = panel_top + padding,
    y_tick  = panel_top + padding - tick_len,
    label   = sig
  )
}

add_brackets <- function(p, br) {
  p +
    geom_segment(data = br, inherit.aes = FALSE,
                 aes(x = x_start, xend = x_end, y = y_pos, yend = y_pos),
                 linewidth = 0.45, color = "gray10") +
    geom_segment(data = br, inherit.aes = FALSE,
                 aes(x = x_start, xend = x_start, y = y_tick, yend = y_pos),
                 linewidth = 0.45, color = "gray10") +
    geom_segment(data = br, inherit.aes = FALSE,
                 aes(x = x_end, xend = x_end, y = y_tick, yend = y_pos),
                 linewidth = 0.45, color = "gray10") +
    geom_text(data = br, inherit.aes = FALSE,
              aes(x = (x_start + x_end)/2, y = y_pos, label = label),
              size = 5, fontface = "bold", vjust = -0.35)
}

# ============================================================================
# PANEL A — Total SMS across T1–T4
# ============================================================================
br_total <- make_full_timeline_bracket(SMS_plot, "Total",
                                       padding = 6, tick_len = 2.5, sig = "**")
y_top_total <- br_total$y_pos + 5

p_A_raw <- ggplot(SMS_plot, aes(x = Timepoint, y = Total, fill = Group)) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "bar",
               position = position_dodge(dodge_w),
               width = 0.7, color = "black", linewidth = 0.4, alpha = 0.95) +
  geom_point(aes(color = Group),
             position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 0.18,
                                              dodge.width = dodge_w),
             size = 1.4, alpha = 0.6, show.legend = FALSE) +
  stat_summary(fun.data = mean_se, geom = "errorbar",
               width = 0.18, position = position_dodge(dodge_w),
               color = "black", linewidth = 0.5) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = group_colors) +
  scale_color_manual(values = group_colors) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, y_top_total)) +
  labs(title = "Total SMS", y = "Score", x = NULL) +
  sms_panel_theme

p_A_raw <- add_brackets(p_A_raw, br_total)

# ============================================================================
# PANEL B — Mind at T3, PANEL C — Body at T3
# ============================================================================
mind_t3 <- SMS_plot %>% filter(Timepoint == "T3") %>%
  select(Participant_ID, Group, Score = Mind)
body_t3 <- SMS_plot %>% filter(Timepoint == "T3") %>%
  select(Participant_ID, Group, Score = Body)

br_mind <- make_t3_bracket(mind_t3, padding = 4.5, tick_len = 1.8, sig = "*")
br_body <- make_t3_bracket(body_t3, padding = 2,   tick_len = 0.8, sig = "**")

build_t3_subscale <- function(df, br, panel_title) {
  y_top <- br$y_pos + br$y_pos * 0.05
  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = Group, y = Score, fill = Group)) +
    stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "bar",
                 width = 0.65, color = "black", linewidth = 0.4, alpha = 0.95) +
    geom_point(aes(color = Group),
               position = position_jitter(width = 0.12, seed = 1),
               size = 1.6, alpha = 0.6, show.legend = FALSE) +
    stat_summary(fun.data = mean_se, geom = "errorbar",
                 width = 0.18, color = "black", linewidth = 0.5) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = group_colors) +
    scale_color_manual(values = group_colors) +
    scale_x_discrete(labels = c("Control"="Control",
                                "2D Meditation"="2D",
                                "VR Meditation"="VR")) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, y_top)) +
    labs(title = panel_title, y = "Score", x = NULL) +
    sms_panel_theme
  add_brackets(p, br)
}

p_B_raw <- build_t3_subscale(mind_t3, br_mind, "Mind Subscale at T3")
p_C_raw <- build_t3_subscale(body_t3, br_body, "Body Subscale at T3")

# ============================================================================
# CORNER BADGES
# ============================================================================
add_corner_badge <- function(plot, letter,
                             x = 0.015, y = 0.99,
                             box_w = 0.030, box_h = 0.075) {
  ggdraw(plot) +
    draw_grob(
      grid::rectGrob(
        x = x, y = y,
        width = box_w, height = box_h,
        just = c("left", "top"),
        gp = grid::gpar(fill = "white", col = "black", lwd = 0.8)
      )
    ) +
    draw_text(
      letter,
      x = x + box_w/2, y = y - box_h/2,
      hjust = 0.5, vjust = 0.5,
      size = 13, fontface = "bold"
    )
}

# Panel A is wider (full width), B and C are narrower (half each)
# Adjust box_w so A's badge isn't too wide and B/C aren't too narrow
p_A <- add_corner_badge(p_A_raw, "A", box_w = 0.025, box_h = 0.07)
p_B <- add_corner_badge(p_B_raw, "B", box_w = 0.045, box_h = 0.075)
p_C <- add_corner_badge(p_C_raw, "C", box_w = 0.045, box_h = 0.075)

# ============================================================================
# LEGEND
# ============================================================================
legend_plot <- get_legend(
  p_A_raw + theme(legend.position = "top",
                  legend.title    = element_blank(),
                  legend.text     = element_text(size = 14),
                  legend.key.size = unit(0.9, "cm"))
)

# ============================================================================
# COMBINE — legend on top, A full width, B+C side by side below
# ============================================================================
bottom_row <- (p_B | p_C)
panels_block <- p_A / bottom_row

combined_SMS <- wrap_plots(
  legend_plot,
  panels_block,
  ncol = 1,
  heights = c(0.04, 1)
)

combined_SMS <- combined_SMS +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "State Mindfulness Findings",
    theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16,
                                            hjust = 0.5,
                                            margin = margin(b = 12)))
  )

print(combined_SMS)

# ============================================================================
# SAVE
# ============================================================================
ggsave("Combined_SMS.png", combined_SMS,
       width = 14, height = 10, dpi = 600, bg = "white")
```



```{r}
#Calculate the change scores
SMS_wide <- SMS %>%
pivot_wider(
id_cols = c(Participant_ID, Group),
names_from = Timepoint,
values_from = c(Total, Mind, Body)
)
View(SMS_wide)
SMS_wide <- SMS_wide %>%
mutate(
change_Total = Total_T3 - Total_T1,
change_Mind = Mind_T3 - Mind_T1,
change_Body = Body_T3 - Body_T1
)
m_total_change <- lm(change_Total ~ Group, data = SMS_wide)
anova(m_total_change)
```

```{r}
emmeans(m_total_change, pairwise ~ Group)

m_mind_change <- lm(change_Mind ~ Group, data = SMS_wide)
anova(m_mind_change)
emmeans(m_mind_change, pairwise ~ Group)

m_body_change <- lm(change_Body ~ Group, data = SMS_wide)
anova(m_body_change)
emmeans(m_body_change, pairwise ~ Group)
```
